title: eubotrys elongata
intro: Eubotrys elongata, also known as the fetid buckeye or fetid beechdrop, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family, native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The Eubotrys elongata plant is valued for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using its roots in traditional folk remedies.
